message:
feat(core): wire fleet coordinator to real backpressure and memory monitors (ft-dwjtm)

Replace the synthetic/placeholder fleet scrollback coordinator inputs
with actual runtime subsystems:

- BackpressureManager drives queue-depth tier evaluation instead of
  raw signals_from_queue_depths()
- MemoryPressureMonitor samples host memory state for the coordinator
- PaneRegistry arena stats supply real warm-byte accounting per pane
  instead of all-zero PaneScrollbackInfo placeholders
- Each coordinator evaluation is recorded as a MaintenanceRecord with
  structured telemetry metadata for diagnostics

Extract two helpers (build_fleet_pressure_signals,
fleet_pane_infos_from_registry) with dedicated unit tests. Populate
the new HealthSnapshot::fleet_pressure_tier field with the compound
tier from each evaluation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
